Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Golds]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — The cloudship is crewed by ordinary Golds.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — The Empire performs its displays using Golds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Naru Huan has an escort of Golds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Combat between Golds is a notable level of combat.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Golds are a group that can be rallied.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Emala brought lesser Golds to help with her siege when she was a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — The combat-capable Golds in Moongrave channel their madra into script networks to fuel weapons.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — Spiritual perception might mistake Lindon and Yerin for Golds.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
